bullets: `secrets-guard` Read and Grep handlers now consume the `path` kind from the shared detection registry (the Bash branch was already migrated in 2.66.0). Adding a new credential-file path becomes a 1-line edit in `detection-registry.json` that covers Read, Grep, and Bash uniformly — no per-handler regex change. Hook-side allowlists (`.example`/`.template`, `.pub`) and the runtime `.git/config` credential-remote check stay in the hook. No behavior change expected; same `tests/hooks/test-secrets-guard.sh` suite passes.
